items.title: [正面] This is the BEST gacha game I have ever played. Ev...
items.summary:
This is the BEST gacha game I have ever played. Everything you do in this game gives you the currency needed for wishes. You can also still get exclusive characters without needing the irl money paid for type of currency. The SSR wish rate is also higher than I've seen in most gacha games. I can pretty much get an SSR character or stat card everyday, if I have enough wishes.

I've seen other reviews say that the English sub is not that great because it's still in beta and AI generated, but it's honestly not that bad. You can clearly read what is happening in the story and what cards do with minimal spelling or translation errors. I just wish this game had a bigger English fandom because it is truly a wonderful game and deserves love.

(Insert comment about eldritch waifus and booba.)
